    Gabriel Ganley, a 22-year-old Brazilian bodybuilder and influencer, was found dead in his São Paulo apartment.
  • NEW[St. Louis] Scientists discovered a new type of octopus. It's bright blue and the size of a golf ball · 2026-05-27

  • NEW[St. Louis] Southern California officials lift all evacuation orders for residents near damaged chemical tank · 2026-05-27
    The crisis forced 50,000 people to evacuate in and around the Orange County city of Garden Grove last week.
  • NEW[St. Louis] Texas Senate Primary Runoff Election 2026 Live Results: Ken Paxton beats John Cornyn in GOP runoff · 2026-05-27
    Paxton's victory in Tuesday’s runoff makes Cornyn the first Republican senator from Texas to lose the party’s nomination for reelection.
  • NEW[St. Louis] ‘I finally know who did this’: Arrest made in 33-year-old cold case murder · 2026-05-27
    Investigators say forensic genealogy DNA helped identify the man accused of killing a woman found in a roadside ditch stripped of clothing near Granite City in 1993.
  • NEW[St. Louis] National Hamburger Day is Thursday. Free burgers, BOGO deals and deep discounts are on the menu · 2026-05-27
    Here's where you can score a deal on May 28.
  • NEW[St. Louis] Salvation Army and local contractor step in to save St. Louis tornado survivor's home · 2026-05-27
    Salvation Army St. Louis secures $55,000 to rebuild tornado survivor's home. Alonzo Townsend's home was destroyed after a tree crashed into the roof.
  • NEW[St. Louis] Packers running back Josh Jacobs arrested on charges related to domestic abuse · 2026-05-27
    Josh Jacobs is the Packers’ top returning rusher after running for 929 yards and 13 touchdowns last season.
  • NEW[St. Louis] Ferguson-Florissant School District settles $1.75M lawsuit over former principal's alleged sexual abuse · 2026-05-26
    The district will pay $1.75M to settle a lawsuit from a former student alleging abuse by ex-principal Cedric Gerald, who remains in jail on child sex abuse charges.

    “You have women who are American citizens, but violent offenders, in with ICE detainees that have had nothing but a speeding ticket,” Rep. Nikki Budzinski said.
  • NEW[St. Louis] Florida man sues Carnival Cruise for $5M, claims severe burns from hot deck · 2026-05-26
    The lawsuit alleges Jorge Luis Alverio Nunez suffered second-degree burns on his feet "within seconds of ordinary contact" with a Carnival cruise ship deck.
  • NEW[St. Louis] Clarence B. Jones, who helped MLK write 'I Have A Dream' speech, dies at 95 · 2026-05-26
    Jones was heavily involved in some of the key moments of the Civil Rights Movement up until the Rev. Martin Luther King, Jr.’s assassination in 1968.
  • NEW[St. Louis] Construction crews begin transforming White House South Lawn into UFC arena · 2026-05-26
    Construction is underway on the South Lawn of the White House for a UFC event tied to America's 250th anniversary celebration.
  • NEW[St. Louis] Texas runoff election results: County-by-county live maps for key races · 2026-05-26
    The runoffs included the closely watched GOP U.S. Senate race between John Cornyn and Ken Paxton.
  • NEW[St. Louis] Woman hurt after dog triggers shotgun outside Nebraska store · 2026-05-26

  • NEW[St. Louis] St. Louis native named to U.S. men's national team for 2026 World Cup · 2026-05-26
    The roster announcement came less than three weeks before the tournament opens across the United States, Canada and Mexico.
  • NEW[St. Louis] Man facing charges after 6-year-old shoots self in face in St. Louis County · 2026-05-26
    The man told police he kept the loaded gun under his mattress. The child was listed in critical condition at an area hospital.
  • NEW[St. Louis] Trump administration proposes NDAs for federal employees to stop leaks · 2026-05-26
    The notice asked for comment on a draft NDA to be used by federal agencies for “both new and existing employees."
  • NEW[St. Louis] President Trump declares 'Everything checked out PERFECTLY' after medical visit to Walter Reed · 2026-05-26
    President Donald Trump turns 80 in June and is the oldest person elected to the role. This is the fourth time he has publicly seen doctors during his second term.
  • NEW[St. Louis] AMC launching a 'Silver Screen' series, showcasing classic films at select theaters · 2026-05-26
    The monthly program includes classics like "Singin' In The Rain," "Cat on a Hot Tin Roof" and more.
  • NEW[St. Louis] NASA fine tunes lunar missions and plans to build a moon base with sights set on Mars · 2026-05-26
    NASA announced an agencywide realignment last week and is continuing to refine its planned lunar missions with a far-reaching goal to bring humans to Mars.
  • NEW[St. Louis] Pizza Hut bringing back the '90s at "Classic" restaurants: See the full list of locations · 2026-05-26

  • NEW[St. Louis] Gene-editing cholesterol away, new Alzheimer's findings and a supplement warning · 2026-05-26
